title: botrys glaucus
intro: Botrys glaucus, also known as Lomatium, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Lomatium include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and support the immune system. Lomatium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and wellness.
